title: tecoma obovata
intro: Tecoma obovata, also known as yellow trumpetbush, is a flowering plant species in the family Bignoniaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tecoma obovata include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Tecoma obovata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its dried leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
